label: New
items: Head Gardener — your own personal AI garden manager (Evergreen). Open the new Head Gardener tab for a full, goal-by-goal breakdown of your whole garden, not just one-off tips.

Garden Brief — tell your Head Gardener what you want from your garden (grow your own, year-round colour, attract wildlife, low-maintenance, containers, family-safe and more) and it manages everything toward your goals. It can even draft your brief for you.
Estate Report — a standing, plain-English review of how your garden is doing, organised by your goals, with the gaps worth closing and exactly what to do about them.
Year Plan — a rolling, month-by-month game plan tailored to your goals, climate, hemisphere and season.
Ask your Head Gardener — chat about your whole garden and get grounded, personalised advice; it quietly remembers the plants and styles you mention.
Continuity — your Head Gardener remembers what it suggested and follows up as you act on it, so it feels like a real gardener looking after your patch.
